name_en: 💞 Chanel Le Boy 23 New A94804 Calfskin. Chanel 23B New Season Limited Autumn/Winter Collection. Chanel Le Boy Black and Gold Medium 🍯 Handle Style. Added a metal vintage handle to the classic style. The calfskin is really premium, fell in love at first sight 💞. Size: 25cm
